fixes_applied: tests/test.sh: replaced SWE-rebench-stub `go test ./...` (which returned ~0.99 against the buggy baseline because almost every existing test still passed without the patch) with 6 weighted F2P behavioral/structural gates targeting the canonical-patch deltas

tests/test_manifest.yaml: replaced 6 vague gates (build_compiles, existing_tests_pass, go_vet_clean, …) with 6 implementation-agnostic gates whose IDs match the inline test.sh checks; weights sum to 1.00
REPO path: kept /workspace/cli (matches Dockerfile WORKDIR) — earlier reference rescues used /workspace/repo, which would silently fail here
f2p_added: F2P_METADATA_TRANSCRIPT_FIELD (0.20) — CommittedMetadata gains a field with json tag transcript_path
F2P_OPTIONS_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT (0.20) — WriteCommittedOptions gains a NEW string field whose Go name contains both 'Transcript' and 'Path'
F2P_HOME_RELATIVE_HELPER (0.20) — strategy/common.go gains any function calling os.UserHomeDir()
F2P_COMMITTED_WRITES_TRANSCRIPT (0.10) — committed.go references opts.<new field> on a `:` assignment line
F2P_CONDENSE_PASSES_TRANSCRIPT (0.15) — condensation.go references the new field as a struct-literal key (or inlines UserHomeDir/TrimPrefix on state.TranscriptPath)
F2P_REWIND_USES_METADATA_PATH (0.15) — manual_commit_rewind.go reads <…>Metadata.TranscriptPath when classifying / restoring
notes: Canonical patch found at .claude/worktrees/exciting-shaw-9e4099/data-pipeline/artifacts_swechat/canonical_patches/aa4038a5-34b6-41e4-8541-9cca654dcbc5.json (NOT under the main artifacts_*/canonical_patches/ tree). commit_sha=ef4d2e38, parent=1b69ae14da4a (matches Dockerfile checkout). The instruction.md text is misleading (it describes the prior multi-session multi-agent rewind work, which was already done at the buggy parent commit) but the actual ground truth in the canonical patch is the 'persist transcript_path into checkpoint metadata + restore from it' refactor across 5 files. All 6 gates target that refactor with implementation-agnostic signals (json tag name, field-name pattern, UserHomeDir presence). Local validation against /tmp/cli_aa4038: parent commit 1b69ae14 → reward 0.0000 (all 6 F2P fail, P2P go-build passes informationally); canonical commit ef4d2e38 → reward 1.0000 (all 6 F2P pass).
